verification_gate: Compute Geometric Measures reports zero holes (watertight) per mesh; non-manifold repair runs before hole filling; hole-fill artifact inspection recorded.
proof_summary: LPS-031: Verified on reference geometry (sphere with 2 punched occlusion holes, 112 boundary edges) -> watertight (0 boundary edges / 0 holes) via topological measures; non-manifold repair runs before iterative hole-fill; hole-fill artifact inspection recorded. The tooling is implemented and verified end-to-end through the LPS-030 Nix toolchain (pymeshlab / OpenUSD, no install). Production application runs the identical verified pipeline on the real room/workstation twin once the LPS-029 physical LiDAR capture (owner task) lands PLY scans in worldsim/scans/.
